title: senecio johnstonii var. alticola
intro: Senecio johnstonii var. alticola, also known as the Mountain Ragwort, is a plant species within the daisy family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of this plant are said to include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Senecio johnstonii var. alticola is often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
